feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: why wasn't italy punished for world war 2

entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: If you insult the president in Russia you disappear. If you insult the president…
entry.content: If you insult the president in Russia you disappear. If you insult the president in Saudi Arabia you get lashed. If you insult the president in America you get 40k likes and a blue check. Which system do you think projects actual power and stability?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: why the fuck can't i just live in my dreams from now on, i mean like my sleep-dr…
entry.content: why the fuck can't i just live in my dreams from now on, i mean like my sleep-dreams, that world is a billion times more stimulating and interesting than anything that ever happens in my waking life, why can't i just have a dream one night and just keep dreaming forever? is that really impossible? nothing in my waking life is even enjoyable or necessary, besides the body maintainance stuff, but if i was constantly dreaming then i wouldn't need to maintain my body, or maybe i would have to, but i
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: What's keeping you from finding love in the Far East?
entry.content: Female population in East Asia - China: 692.6 million - Japan: 62.8 million - South Korea: 25.7 million - North Korea: 13.7 million - Taiwan: 11.7 million - Mongolia: 1.78 million - Hong Kong: 4.06 million - Macau: 387,000
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Fighting Game of the Summer
entry.content: Which one of you playing? For me it's Tokon. Avatar looks cool but I don't like the Avatar series. Azula looks cool but I don't know if she's enough to get me to commit to the game. Tokon's gamplay depth has drastically improved confirmed in the recent guide videos so I'm started to get hype for Tokon
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: where do people get chatgpt codes?
entry.content: don't feel like paying 20$ a month for codex so i've been buying 1month plus accounts from z2u at ~8 usd, if they're not banned they last a bit more than that. they give you a mail account with a paid subscription. last one i bought got banned within a week, but what catched my eye was that the seller pointed me to go to this chinese website (chongzhi.art/mailbox) and paste a code to get OTPs for login. looking deeper that site has a "redeem center" (picrel) on the main page where you paste a co
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: help an anon with an anxiety crisis
entry.content: How do you get out of a month long anxiety crisis induced by intrusive toughts without falling for addictive shit? I am trying to go running but it's hard to mantain because the anxiety makes me very tired, i tried numbing everything away with junk food and cheap entertainment, it worked for a few days but the intrusive toughts are back. I have no friends and i don't want to bother my family with this bullshit, i have a doctor apppointment soon because i need to get a blood test, should i tell h
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: >the BBC question Hey. As a gay man who is interested in religion, I wanna expla…
entry.content: >the BBC question Hey. As a gay man who is interested in religion, I wanna explain to some people who do not know what the "BBC" phenomena is. Dicks are the representation of human, masculine fertility. Dicks are symbols of fertility and power. The pic related is what hindus call the "Shiva Lingam, or literally the "Symbol of God", which is a phallic figure. They worship it and pour milk over it to represent the divine power of God, fertility, the divine masculinity and the power of creation. A

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: My philosophy is if I buy a game then I have the rights to every version of it o…
entry.content: My philosophy is if I buy a game then I have the rights to every version of it on every platform it appears on. Except in the case of a remaster or remake, in which case I need to buy that one. However if I were to buy a remaster or remake and not the original version of a game, then I inherit the right to the original version along with it. Anyone else have a strict moral code like I do?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: According to his file, he had signed up for MAID exactly one year ago. However, …
entry.content: According to his file, he had signed up for MAID exactly one year ago. However, his designated companion had died shortly after registration, automatically placing his application on indefinite hold. Because the state had already seized his apartment and all his property upon his initial signup, he has spent the last twelve months living on the street, waiting to be cleared for transport to the MAID disposal zone where he can be euthanized.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Guitars screeching every which way, beats speeding and hesitating and slamming c…
entry.content: Guitars screeching every which way, beats speeding and hesitating and slamming chaos back into the box, twentysomething boyvoices whining and arguing and drawling and straining, it's the world according to indie rock: a tantrum set to music as sharp and self-contained as a comedy routine. Aurally, this is now--one now, anyway. If it has zero to say about tomorrow, why don't you just worry about that then? A
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.content: When did hardcore become pozzed? In the mid 2000s going to hardcore shows like bane or madball was fun, and a community experience, but all the new hardcore bands I’ve seen in the last decade are pozzed with lgbt shit fighting nazis ect. Pic related this band gets recommended on my YouTube feed.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: anyone want to review a minimalist text board i made
entry.content: been lurking here for years and finally got off my ass and made something. wanted an anonymous text-only board, no images, no js bloat, no accounts tied to email or phone. basically what a board should be before everyone decided you need a google account and a captcha farm just to post. styled it kinda like win7 aero because i miss when uis had some personality instead of everything being the same flat gray rectangle. green tone is a nod to obvious inspiration but it's its own thing, not a reski
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Agentic AI is a grift
entry.content: >Try vs code with ollama and qween coder and cline >It takes more effort to try to create a basic folder with this shit than to just create the folders and files manually Nice grifter tech you have there, faggots. 20 trillions more and 500 thousand more datacenters and you'll create a tool that can make a folder, lmao. faggots.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Anti Minidisc Alliance
entry.content: MD(Mini Disk) use ATRAC cording. ATRAC can not reproduction music,specially sound acoustic. Hi-level frequency arise from "cording distortion" Sound is hard and not Musicality. Sound is not natural, not mild. MD sound is not have harmony, Listen Claudio Abbado conducting Bruckner Symphony No.7 Herbert von Karajan conducting Bethoven Symphony No.5 Carpenters and Beetles. Acoustic changes different and stuck to "cording distortion" MP3 more terrible "cording distortion". SONY ATRAC typeR and Pio
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /hdgg/ - Human Domestication Guide General, 223rd Bloom
entry.content: General for discussion of Human Domestication Guide & related fiction. simple translation edition >What is HDG? HDG is a collective kink writing project about the Affini (an advanced precursor civilization from outer space), who aggressively care for every other species in the universe. They have finally turned their glittery eyes on future grimderp hypercapitalist nightmare humanity. Using their natural charisma and various classes of Xenodrugs, they aim to make Florets (d̶o̶c̶i̶l̶e̶,̶ ̶d̶r̶u̶g
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic
